guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 19. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_ai: Point to the big AI and say: aiaiai. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_ea: Now point to the big EA and say: eaeaea.

parent_story: The rain fell on the train. A green leaf floated down to the track.
